antipattern.reason: Dashboards diverge; counts no longer comparable. Detector: primary_label outside closed enum. Fix: r1-closed-taxonomy.
Audit impossible later. Detector: evidence field empty. Fix: r2-evidence-required.

antipattern.description: Multiple primary labels on one incident.
antipattern.reason: Double-counts inflate the failing class. Detector: multi-label JSON shape. Fix: r3-one-primary-label.
